# CivicConnect

> A smart citizen issue reporting platform that empowers communities to report, track, and resolve civic issues with real-time updates, analytics, and transparency.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Landing page with platform overview, real-time civic issue statistics, and feature highlights.
- [About](/about): Mission, vision, and how CivicConnect bridges the gap between citizens and local authorities.
- [How It Works](/works): Step-by-step guide to reporting issues, tracking progress, and understanding the civic resolution workflow.
- [Track Issue](/track): Check the status of a reported civic issue using its unique ticket ID.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach out to the CivicConnect team for support, feedback, or partnerships.
- [FAQ](/faq): Answers to common questions about reporting issues, privacy, and platform usage.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How user data, issue reports, and personal information are collected, used, and protected.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Rules, guidelines, and user responsibilities for using the CivicConnect platform.
